bubble_type.description: Canonical type of the entity being described.
bubble_type.normalization_rule: Map surface forms such as nanobubble, micro-nanobubble, ultrafine bubble, microbubble, or nanoparticle to a controlled vocabulary.

material_identity.description: Gas, coating, core material, or cargo identity.
material_identity.normalization_rule: Normalize chemical names and abbreviations where possible; otherwise preserve the reported term.

application_category.normalization_rule: Use a controlled set such as biomedical, environmental, industrial, agriculture, clinical translation, or fundamentals.

size_value.description: Numeric size value reported in text or table.
size_value.normalization_rule: Store the numeric portion only and preserve ranges as separate records if needed.

size_unit.description: Unit associated with the size value.
size_unit.normalization_rule: Normalize to standard SI-style units where possible.

zeta_potential_value.normalization_rule: Store the measured numeric value only.

stability_value.description: Measured or reported stability duration, persistence, or stability score.
stability_value.normalization_rule: Preserve the reported stability measure and normalize the unit if possible.

payload_text.description: Loaded cargo, drug, dye, or functional payload.
payload_text.normalization_rule: Preserve the reported payload or cargo term.

loading_efficiency_value.normalization_rule: Store the numeric percentage or fraction as reported.

release_profile_text.description: Text describing release behavior or kinetics.
release_profile_text.normalization_rule: Keep the reported description and avoid paraphrasing away kinetics.

generation_method.description: Method used to generate the bubble or particle system.
generation_method.normalization_rule: Normalize method names and preserve any special processing steps.

characterization_method.description: Method used to characterize the system.
characterization_method.normalization_rule: Use standard method names such as DLS, NTA, TEM, SEM, zeta analyzer, or microscopy.

medium_environment.description: Medium, solvent, biological fluid, or environmental context.
medium_environment.normalization_rule: Preserve the study environment and normalize common media names.

outcome_claim.description: Main scientific claim or outcome statement.

evidence_span.description: Text span, table cell, or caption supporting the extracted field.
evidence_span.normalization_rule: Store the exact citation location or text span reference rather than invented evidence.

ambiguity_flag.description: Whether the record is direct, inferred, incomplete, or uncertain.
ambiguity_flag.normalization_rule: Use one of direct, inferred, incomplete, or uncertain.
